headline: Embecta to Acquire Owen Mumford to Expand Drug-Delivery Portfolio
summary: EMBC to acquire Owen Mumford for up to $199.4M, aiming to expand beyond diabetes into high-value drug delivery and boost long-term growth.

headline: Are GLP-1 Drugs Becoming a Meaningful Revenue Driver for CAH Stock?
summary: CAH sees GLP-1 drugs boost revenue growth, but margins lag as strong demand lifts volumes without significantly improving profitability.

raw.headline: Are GLP-1 Drugs Becoming a Meaningful Revenue Driver for CAH Stock?

headline: ECL to Boost Data Center AI Cooling Platform With CoolIT Acquisition
summary: Ecolab's $4.75B CoolIT deal boosts its AI data center cooling push, expanding into high-growth liquid cooling and unlocking recurring revenue opportunities.

raw.headline: ECL to Boost Data Center AI Cooling Platform With CoolIT Acquisition

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Cardinal (CAH) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Cardinal (CAH) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

raw.headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Cardinal (CAH) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
raw.summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Cardinal (CAH) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Cardinal Health Appoints Patricia A. Hemingway Hall as Board Chair
summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Patricia A. Hemingway Hall to succeed Gregory B. Kenny as Chair of the Board following Mr. Kenny's retirement, effective immediately.

raw.headline: Cardinal Health Appoints Patricia A. Hemingway Hall as Board Chair
